design_philosophy: Cyber-Noir aesthetic blending luxury materials (dark matte leather) with minimalist etched-gold and neon-line art. The interface acts as a masculine, minimalist command console for a self-mastery program. High contrast, sharp edges, hairline borders, and glowing accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tight

layout_and_spacing.system: Dense 'Control Room' Bento Grid for dashboard sections.
layout_and_spacing.borders: hairline borders (1px solid border-default). Avoid soft rounded corners to maintain the masculine, command-console feel.

surface_strategies.background_texture: Use the dark leather background image with a very heavy black overlay (e.g., bg-black/90 or mix-blend-multiply) to create a subtle matte leather texture.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (#0D0E12), 1px subtle border (#2A2B32), no shadow. Hover state: slight neon glow drop-shadow and border color shifts.
surface_strategies.act_cards: Each act card must feature its respective elemental neon color as a top border (border-t-2) and subtle glowing effects.
surface_strategies.buttons_etched_gold: bg-transparent border border-gold text-gold hover:bg-gold hover:text-black transition-all duration-300

components.navigation: Minimalist top bar. Brand logo on left, current 'Seeker Status' (avatar + level) on right. Glassmorphism or solid dark bg.
components.act_cards: 4 column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4). Elements: Earth (Green), Water (Blue), Fire (Red), Air (Yellow). Card content includes act number, title, element icon, and an 'ENTER' button.
components.progress_widgets: Bento grid below acts. Seeker status avatar, current stage indicator, checklist of reflections, and a circular progress tracker. Use dense, terminal-like spacing.
components.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn components but override borders to be square (rounded-none), text to mono where appropriate, and focus rings to gold or neon colors.

images.description: Dark matte leather texture. Apply heavy dark overlay so it doesn't distract from the UI.
Cyberpunk silhouette avatar for the Seeker Status widget.

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for clean, technical, duotone or sharp line icons matching the cyber-noir aesthetic.

animations.hover: Subtle border color shifts, neon text shadows.
animations.motion: Use framer-motion for staggering entrance of bento grid cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup framer-motion for animations.
Install and setup recharts for the circular progress gauge.
Use standard Tailwind classes, extending the configuration for fonts (Unbounded, JetBrains Mono, Outfit) and custom colors provided.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
Ensure the layout mimics a high-tech, luxury terminal. Use exact hex colors provided.
Do NOT use generic rounded cards with drop shadows. Stick strictly to flat, sharp, hairline-bordered geometric layouts.
